note: 2026-04-28 (later): re-elected via 660-config intensive grid + pattern analysis. Original intensive_grid screened on top-20-by-IS-PF and missed this candidate (IS PF only 1.15). Pattern analysis on all 540 OOS-eligible configs surfaced ensemble_regime+trail2.5+no-4h-agree as the BTC signature; long_only+hma_slope+sl=1.5 was the strongest validated variant. Full OOS gate PASS: OOS n=13 / pnl $+294 / PF 5.94 / WR 92%. Beats random by +4.96 PF. ±20% sens holds (PF 1.56-1.62). Quartiles: Q1 -$291 (rough patch), Q2-Q4 all positive. CAVEAT: only 1/4 quartiles negative is at the gate limit; IS PF 1.15 is weak — strategy depends on the OOS-window regime persisting. Reassess after 30 days more data. | Earlier 2026-04-28: direction both→long_only. Trigger: live ran 6 setups = 2W (+$542 both longs) / 4L (-$649 incl 2 shorts -$236). 41d backtest produced 32 longs, 0 shorts — 'both' was effectively long-only in IS. Live takes BTC shorts the 15m backtest doesn't model (5m/15m gap). long_only aligns deployed direction with the actual scope of OOS evidence (PF 2.12 / OOS +$384). Reassess if backtester upgraded to 5m. | 2026-04-26: enabled 1h SJM filter (use_1h_filter=true, trend_filter_1h=sjm). Was filter-OFF since deploy. Trigger: 6 live trades = 4W/2L but net -$253 because the 2 losers had FE<1 ATR (entries were wrong from the start). 41d head-to-head with params held fixed: filter-OFF baseline -$231 → SJM +$79 (delta +$310). SJM cuts entries 31→13 (60%), lifts WR 66.7%→79.2%, PF 0.79→1.19. Other variants tested (ema_cross, structure, both_agree, hma_slope) all worse or no-op. Caveat: 13 OOS trades is small N; reassess after 30 more days. | 2026-04-24: added FARTCOIN-style TP ladder (TP1 3.0 ATR x30%, TP2 4.5x30%, TP3 6.0x20%, trail 2.5). Was TP1-only 2.0x30%. Trail is inert under ensemble_hybrid (commod_backtest.py:433) — ladder drives the uplift.
